title: Snowflake Warehouse
description: A Snowflake virtual warehouse provides the compute resources required to execute queries and perform DML operations. A warehouse can be started, suspended, resized, and configured for auto-suspend and auto-resume.

name.description: Identifier for the virtual warehouse. Must be unique within the account.

warehouse_type.description: Type of warehouse specifying the compute resource architecture.

warehouse_size.description: Size of the warehouse determining the number of compute resources per cluster.

wait_for_completion.description: When resizing a warehouse, block the return of the ALTER WAREHOUSE command until the resize has finished provisioning all its compute resources.

max_cluster_count.description: Specifies the maximum number of clusters for a multi-cluster warehouse. For a single-cluster warehouse, this value is 1.

min_cluster_count.description: Specifies the minimum number of clusters for a multi-cluster warehouse. For a single-cluster warehouse, this value is 1.

scaling_policy.description: Scaling policy for a multi-cluster warehouse that determines when additional clusters are started or shut down.

auto_suspend.description: Number of seconds of inactivity after which a warehouse is automatically suspended. A value of 0 means the warehouse is never automatically suspended.

auto_resume.description: Specifies whether to automatically resume a warehouse when a SQL statement is submitted to it.

initially_suspended.description: Specifies whether the warehouse is created initially in the Suspended state.

resource_monitor.description: Specifies the name of a resource monitor that is explicitly assigned to the warehouse. When a resource monitor is explicitly assigned, the monitor controls the monthly credits used by the warehouse.

comment.description: Specifies a comment for the warehouse.

enable_query_acceleration.description: Specifies whether to enable the query acceleration service for queries that rely on this warehouse for compute resources.

query_acceleration_max_scale_factor.description: Specifies the maximum scale factor for leasing compute resources for query acceleration. The scale factor is used as a multiplier based on warehouse size.

max_concurrency_level.description: Object parameter that specifies the concurrency level for SQL statements executed by a warehouse cluster.

statement_queued_timeout_in_seconds.description: Object parameter that specifies the time, in seconds, a SQL statement can be queued on a warehouse before it is canceled by the system.

statement_timeout_in_seconds.description: Object parameter that specifies the time, in seconds, after which a running SQL statement is canceled by the system.

warehouse_credit_limit.description: Credit limit that can be consumed by the warehouse.

target_statement_size.description: Target statement size for adaptive warehouses.

state.description: The current state of the warehouse.

running.description: Number of SQL statements that are being executed by the warehouse.

queued.description: Number of SQL statements that are queued for the warehouse.

is_default.description: Whether the warehouse is the default for the current user.

is_current.description: Whether the warehouse is in use for the session. Only one warehouse can be in use at a time for a session.

available.description: Percentage of the warehouse compute resources that are provisioned and available.

provisioning.description: Percentage of the warehouse compute resources that are in the process of provisioning.

quiescing.description: Percentage of the warehouse compute resources that are executing SQL statements but will be shut down once the queries complete.

other.description: Percentage of the warehouse compute resources that are in a state other than available, provisioning, or quiescing.

created_on.description: Date and time when the warehouse was created.

resumed_on.description: Date and time when the warehouse was last started or restarted.

updated_on.description: Date and time when the warehouse was last updated, which includes changing any of the properties of the warehouse or changing the state.

owner_role_type.description: The type of role that owns the object.
